content: <1>Web crawling</1> — AI visits and extracts content from specific web pages to analyze or use in your request.

comment.text: This key provides a tooltip explanation for AI web crawling functionality. It appears within the AI service pricing details, clarifying that AI visits web pages to extract content for analysis or use in requests. Translators should focus on explaining this data gathering process in simple terms.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'Veb qabaqlama' is an incorrect translation for 'Web crawling'. In Azerbaijani, 'qabaqlama' means 'prevention' or 'prefacing', whereas 'crawling' in a technical context should be 'veb skan edilməsi' or 'veb sürüşmə'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Veb skan edilməsi</1> — Yapay Zeka (AI) müəyyən veb səhifələri ziyarət edir və məzmunu təhlil etmək və ya sorğunuzda istifadə etmək üçün çıxarır.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The verb 'navštívil' is in the past tense ('visited'), whereas the English source uses the present tense ('visits') to describe a general function/process.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Web crawling</1> — AI navštíví a extrahuje obsah ze specifických webových stránek k analýze nebo použití ve vašem požadavku.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Korean sentence structure '요청에 분석하거나 사용합니다' is grammatically incorrect and changes the meaning. It translates to 'analyzes or uses in request', whereas the English 'to analyze or use in your request' implies the purpose of the extraction. The particle '에' is used incorrectly here; it should be '요청 분석에 사용하거나' or '요청을 분석하거나 사용합니다'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>웹 크롤링</1> — AI가 특정 웹 페이지를 방문하여 콘텐츠를 추출하고, 이를 분석하거나 요청에 사용합니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical gender error: 'požiadavke' is feminine in Slovak, but the possessive pronoun 'vášom' is masculine. It should be 'vo vašej požiadavke'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Web crawling</1> — AI navštevuje a extrahuje obsah zo špecifických webových stránok na analýzu alebo použitie vo vašej požiadavke.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'Web spletno kopanje' is redundant and incorrect. 'Spletno kopanje' means web crawling, but adding 'Web' before it makes it 'Web web crawling'. Additionally, 'izroni' is a mistranslation of 'extracts' (it means 'to utter/speak' rather than 'to extract/pull out').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Spletno brskanje</1> — AI obišče in pridobi vsebino s specifičnih spletnih strani za analizo ali uporabo v vašem zahtevku.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'Web crawling' is translated as 'Këshirja e faqes', which means 'Requesting the page' or 'Advice of the page'. This is a semantic error; 'Web crawling' in a technical context refers to automated web browsing/scraping.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Rrëmbimi i të dhënave nga uebja</1> — AI viziton dhe nxjerr përmbajtje nga faqe specifike të internetit për t'u analizuar ose përdorur në kërkesën tuaj.
